command:
TOKEN=$(cat /root/.git-credentials 2>/dev/null | grep -o '//[^:]*:[^@]*@' | sed 's|//||;s|@||;s|.*:||' | head -1) && echo '=== Run #10 Jobs ===' && curl -s -H "Authorization: token $TOKEN" 'https://api.github.com/repos/motitap-dotcom/MT5-PropFirm-Bot/actions/runs/22461913767/jobs' | python3 << 'PYEOF'
import sys, json
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
for j in d.get('jobs', []):
    print(f"Job: {j['name']} - {j['status']}/{j.get('conclusion','?')}")
    for s in j.get('steps', []):
        print(f"  [{s.get('conclusion', s['status'])}] {s['name']}")
PYEOF
echo '=== Download run #10 logs ===' && curl -s -L -H "Authorization: token $TOKEN" -H "Accept: application/vnd.github.v3+json" 'https://api.github.com/repos/motitap-dotcom/MT5-PropFirm-Bot/actions/runs/22461913767/logs' -o /tmp/run10.zip 2>&1 && ls -la /tmp/run10.zip && cd /tmp && unzip -o run10.zip -d run10_logs 2>&1 | tail -5 && echo '=== Log files ===' && ls -la /tmp/run10_logs/ 2>&1 && echo '=== Compile job log (last 100 lines) ===' && cat /tmp/run10_logs/*.txt 2>/dev/null | tail -100
